storyboard.content: I have tingling and numbness in my fingers, mainly in my right hand
I sometimes wake up with my hand feeling completely asleep and I have to shake it out to get feeling back
I have started dropping small things like pens or my keys without meaning to
The symptoms have been gradually building up over the past 3 months
It is mild to moderate discomfort - mainly getting in the way of my work tasks and some everyday activities
I am a 34-year-old woman who works in an office and spends a lot of time typing
The tingling and numbness get worse when I am typing at work or using my phone for long stretches
